:::{#thm-observed-marginal-risk}

#### Marginal risk as a conditional expectation

$$\pi(a) = \E{\teal{\pi(a, Z)} \mid \red{A = a}}$$

where $\teal{\pi(a, z)}$ is the conditional predicted risk (@def-cond-predicted-risk).

::: {.proof}

$$
\ba
\pi(a)
&= \Pr(Y = 1 \mid A = a)
&& \text{[definition of observed marginal risk]}
\\
&= \int \Pr(Y = 1 \mid Z=z, A = a)\, \red{f_{Z \mid A}(z \mid a)}\, dz
&& \text{[law of total probability]}
\\
&= \int \teal{\pi(a, z)}\, \red{f_{Z \mid A}(z \mid a)}\, dz
&& \text{[definition of conditional risk]}
\\
&= \E{\teal{\pi(a, Z)} \mid \red{A = a}}
&& \text{[definition of conditional expectation]}
\ea
$$

:::

:::
